mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_cart_item WHERE cart_item_idx=#{cartItemIdx} AND item_status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT * FROM group_cart_item WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx} AND item_status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT * FROM group_cart_item WHERE member_idx = #{memberIdx} AND item_status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT * FROM group_cart_item WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx} AND member_idx = #{memberIdx} AND item_status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT member_idx,TOTAL(item_total_amount) as item_total_amount FROM group_cart_item WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx} AND item_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY member_idx
SELECT TOTAL(item_total_amount) as item_total_amount FROM group_cart_item WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx} AND item_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT menu_idx, TOTAL(item_quantity) as item_quantity, TOTAL(base_amount) as base_amount, TOTAL(option_extra_amount) as option_extra_amount, TOTAL(item_total_amount) as item_total_amount FROM group_cart_item WHERE room_idx = #{roomIdx} AND item_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY menu_idx
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_cart_item( room_idx, member_idx, menu_idx, item_quantity, base_amount, option_extra_amount, item_total_amount, item_status, ) VALUES ( #{roomIdx}, #{memberIdx}, #{menuIdx}, #{itemQuantity}, #{baseAmount}, #{optionExtraAmount}, #{itemTotalAmount}, 'ACTIVE' )
